title: oxytropis halleri var. korabensis
intro: Oxytropis halleri var. korabensis, also known as a type of mountain milkvetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oxytropis halleri var. korabensis include its potential to reduce the risk of kidney stones and to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, as well as its possible anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, often in combination with other medicinal herbs, to support overall health and well-being.
